title: Start `opt_hier` to enable hierarchical optimization
body:
_What are the reasons/motivation for this change?_

Improve QoR in synthesis with preserved module boundaries.

_Explain how this is achieved._

Add `opt_hier` which propagates tied-together signals, tied-off signals, and unused signals both into and out of modules. The pass supports non-uniquified hierarchies in which case it propagates what's common to all instances.

_If applicable, please suggest to reviewers how they can test the change._

See the attached test which verifies functional equivalence on few simple test sources.
